from dataclasses import dataclass
from sqlalchemy import Column, Integer, String
from sqlalchemy.orm import declarative_base

Base = declarative_base()


@dataclass
class UserData:
    name: str
    email: str


class UserParser:
    @staticmethod
    def from_csv_row(row) -> UserData:
        return UserData(name=row[0], email=row[1])

    @staticmethod
    def from_api_response(payload) -> UserData:
        return UserData(name=payload["name"], email=payload["email"])


class User(Base):
    __tablename__ = "users"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    email = Column(String)

    def save(self, session):
        session.add(self)
        session.commit()

    def delete(self, session):
        session.delete(self)
        session.commit()


class UserPresenter:
    @staticmethod
    def to_json(user: User) -> str:
        import json
        return json.dumps({"id": user.id, "name": user.name, "email": user.email})

    @staticmethod
    def to_html(user: User) -> str:
        return f"<div><h1>{user.name}</h1><p>{user.email}</p></div>"
